caption: The video captures a group of individuals, likely a sports team, walking outside a hotel on a sunny day. They are dressed casually, with most wearing gray shirts and black pants, and all are wearing face masks. The setting is well-maintained, featuring neatly trimmed hedges, palm trees, and a modern architectural design with white decorative panels. In the background, a white bus is parked, suggesting that the team might be heading to or returning from an event. The timestamp "TEAM HOTEL 12:47" indicates the location and time of the scene. The atmosphere appears calm and organized as the group moves together in a coordinated manner.
